title: autobench.command v1
description: Control-plane commands sent to autobench to pause, resume, reconfigure, or manipulate an active run. Consumed by the autobench command handler. Source: /autobench/control.

command_id.description: ULID uniquely identifying this command invocation.

target_run_id.description: Optional. ULID of the specific run to target. Null or omitted means all currently active runs.

params.description: Optional. Action-specific parameters. set_budget: {max_requests: int, max_cost_usd: float}; set_generations: {target_generations: int}; reset_island: {island_id: int}.

max_requests.description: For set_budget: new maximum LLM request count.

max_cost_usd.description: For set_budget: new cost cap in USD.

target_generations.description: For set_generations: new target generation count.

island_id.description: For reset_island: index of the island to reset.
